name: Beattie Elementary School
description: Beattie Elementary School is a place to play pickleball in Fort Collins, CO. There is 1 outdoor concrete court. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. Reservations are not available. The court is free.

name: Berthoud Recreation Center
description: Berthoud Recreation Center is a place to play pickleball in Berthoud, CO. There are 14 wood and concrete courts. 8 are outdoors and 6 are indoors. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A one-time fee is required to play. The facility includes amenities like lights. The courts cannot be reserved.
fees: Fee required — Outdoor courts are free

name: Centennial Park
description: Public Courts - Play is free if courts are not reserved.  Must reserve courts through the Loveland Parks and Recreation (web site or walk in).  Court reservation fee is $9.00 (USD) per court per hour - this fee may change from budget year to budget year.

fees: Members only — Play for free for the first 20 days using promo code FREE4ALL for free court reservations and OPEN4ALL for free open plays.
